custom.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
custom.border: 0px 0px 0.625px none none solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9) rgb(235, 238, 245)
custom.fontFamily: "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, "Hiragino Sans GB", "Microsoft YaHei"

tw: relative font-semibold leading-tight text-center visible m-0 pt-2.5 pr-0 pb-2.5 pl-0 overflow-hidden
